ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Sauce (85%) (tomato, beef (22%), onion, water, carrot, tomato paste, apple puree, red pepper, garlic puree, cornflour, olive oil, thyme, basil, medium fat hard cheese (milk), vegetable stock (water, yeast extract, salt, onion powder, carrot juice concentrate, dehydrated potato, sunflower oil, sugar, leek powder, lemon juice concentrate, garlic powder), oregano, rosemary, ground bay leaf), pasta (11%) (durum wheat semolina), mature Cheddar cheese (4%) (milk).
